name: RUM Group Inc.
business: Rumble operates two business units: Rumble Services, which includes a video sharing platform, livestreaming, advertising marketplace, and crypto wallet for creators; and Rumble Cloud, an infrastructure-as-a-service offering. The company generates revenue from advertising, subscriptions, tipping, and cloud services, serving creators, advertisers, publishers, and businesses.

exposures.sentence: Rumble Cloud: an infrastructure as a service (IaaS) offering consisting of a portfolio of compute, storage, security, and networking offerings.
Rumble plans to augment its cloud business with an AI infrastructure offering consisting of GPU as a service (GPUaaS) and data center services.

Rumble Wallet: a non-custodial crypto wallet integrated directly into the Rumble platform that supports USAT, a U.S.-regulated, dollar-backed stablecoin, Tether (USDT), Tether Gold (XAUt), and Bitcoin (BTC), enabling audiences to tip creators natively in crypto.
Rumble Cloud: an infrastructure as a service (IaaS) offering consisting of a portfolio of compute, storage, security, and networking offerings.

Our increasing use of artificial intelligence technologies presents significant regulatory, legal, operational, cybersecurity, and reputational risks that could materially and adversely affect our business, financial condition, and results of operations.

catalysts.event: Close of Northern Data business combination
catalysts.sentence: The ND Business Combination is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to satisfaction of closing conditions and regulatory approvals.
The Company also announced a $100 million advertising commitment from Tether, representing $50 million per year over a two-year period beginning in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Launch of exchange offer for Northern Data shares
catalysts.sentence: The launch of the Exchange Offer is expected to occur during the second quarter of 2026.
